settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Adjust application appearance and behavior

categoriesDesc.aiDesc: Control AI generation settings and model options.
categoriesDesc.dataDesc: Export, import and clear your local chat data.

settings.customModelIdDesc: Optional model identifier to override the default model.
settings.apiKeyDesc: Manage your OpenRouter API key used for AI requests. Stored locally.
settings.themeDesc: Choose theme; 'System' follows your OS preference.
settings.disableBlurDesc: Disable UI background blur for improved performance.
settings.temperatureDesc: Controls randomness; lower is deterministic, higher is creative.
settings.maxTokensDesc: Maximum tokens per response. Lower reduces length.
settings.systemPromptDesc: A system prompt prepended to each request. Leave empty for default behavior.
settings.enterToSendDesc: Send messages with Enter. Shift+Enter creates a newline.
settings.soundEnabledDesc: Play a sound when AI finishes generating a response.
settings.clearSub: This will remove all locally stored chats. This cannot be undone.
settings.dataDescription: Manage your local chat data. Export your history to a JSON file or import it back.
settings.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear all history?
settings.aiIntro: Fine-tune how the AI responds for better control.

chat.welcome: Start a new conversation with AI. Your history will appear here.

python.label: Write Python code...
python.prompt: Write Python code that reads a CSV and returns a DataFrame with an example of usage.
python.title: Write Python code

tz.label: Create a task brief...
tz.prompt: Help me create a frontend developer test assignment with tasks for Vue/Nuxt and evaluation criteria.
tz.title: Create a task brief

cicd.label: Setup CI/CD...
cicd.prompt: Provide a short guide to set up CI/CD using GitHub Actions with tests and deployment steps.
cicd.title: Explain CI/CD

ml.label: ML study plan...
ml.prompt: Prepare a detailed 3-month study plan for machine learning: resources, exercises and projects.
ml.title: ML study plan
